name: Ecosystem Dependency Monitoring
question: Are third-party platforms, cloud infrastructure, and vendor components performing to the levels the operator has committed to its customers?
ifAbsent: Cloud RAN vendor failures, CDN degradation, or third-party API issues are detected only after subscriber complaints. SLA liability falls on the operator for failures originating outside its control.
atL4: Ecosystem health monitoring becomes predictive. The network identifies vendor platform degradation trends before they cause service impact, enabling pre-emptive traffic rerouting or vendor escalation.
